title: Programmes Offered 2026-27

detail.title: Programmes Offered 2026-27
detail.short_info: Guru Nanak College Application Form 2026 is now open for UG and PG Admissions 2026-27. Apply online for Government Aided and Self-Financing streams at GNC Velachery Chennai through the official portal.

content.text: Guru Nanak College Application Form 2026 is now open for the academic year 2026-27. Candidates can apply online for various Undergraduate, Postgraduate and Doctoral programmes offered under Government Aided Stream (GAS) and Self-Financing Streams (SFS-I & SFS-II) at Guru Nanak College (Autonomous), Velachery, Chennai.

sections.heading: Guru Nanak College Application Form 2026: Latest Updates

content.text: The online application process for Guru Nanak College Admissions 2026-27 has commenced. Interested students can submit their applications through the official e-governance portal. The college offers a wide range of programmes with different timings for aided and self-financing streams.

sections.heading: Programmes Offered 2026-27

content.text: Guru Nanak College offers the following programmes under different streams:

sections.heading: Government Aided Stream (GAS) – Timings: 8:00 am - 1:00 pm

items: B.Sc. Plant Biology and Plant Biotechnology

sections.heading: Self Financing Stream (SFS-I) – Timings: 8:00 am - 1:00 pm

items: M.Sc. Computer Science with Artificial Intelligence

sections.heading: Self Financing Stream (SFS-II) – Timings: 1:10 pm - 6:10 pm

items: B.B.A. Bachelor of Business Administration (Retail Management)
B.Sc. Computer Science with Artificial Intelligence

sections.heading: Guru Nanak College Application Form 2026 Important Dates
Eligibility Criteria 2026

rows: Passed Higher Secondary (10+2) or equivalent from a recognized board
Bachelor’s degree in relevant discipline from a recognized university

content.text: Note: Specific subject-wise eligibility criteria are mentioned on the official admission portal.

sections.heading: Application Fee 2026

content.text: Application fee details will be displayed during the online application process. Candidates are advised to check the exact fee amount for their chosen stream and programme on the application portal.

sections.heading: How to Apply for Guru Nanak College Application Form 2026

items: Choose UG or PG application link.
Register with valid email ID and mobile number.
Fill in personal, academic and other required details.
Upload scanned copies of necessary documents.
Submit the form and take a printout of the acknowledgement.

content.text: Apply Online Links are placed above for your convenience.

sections.heading: Documents Required for Guru Nanak College Admission 2026

items: Eligibility Certificate (for students from other boards/universities)
Any other documents as specified by the college
